name: Pennsylvania Dutch Cake-And-Custard Pie - Country Living
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pie crust following package directions for a filled one-crust pie using a 9-inch pie pan.
2. Prepare Filling: In a medium-size bowl, combine sugar, flour, and apple-pie spice. Stir in applesauce, sour cream, molasses, and egg. Set aside.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Prepare Cake: In a small bowl, combine milk and lemon juice; set aside for 5 minutes to allow the milk to sour. In a medium-size bowl with an electric mixer, beat together sugar and butter until light and fluffy. Add the soured milk, egg, and vanilla; beat until smooth. Add flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda; mix on low speed until combined.
4. Spoon the cake mixture evenly into the crust-lined pie pan. Carefully pour the filling mixture over the cake mixture. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes or until the top is firm and golden.
5. Meanwhile, prepare Glaze: In a small bowl, combine confectioners' sugar and brewed coffee. Drizzle glaze over the hot pie. Let the pie cool to warm and serve.
Note: Or, substitute 1/2 t ground cinnamon, 1/4 t ground ginger, 1/8 t ground nutmeg, and 1/8 t ground allspice for apple-pie spice.
